purpose: First real historical GLD Continuation replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle candidate shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, production readiness, generated reports, chart outcomes, and auto-trading.
boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated GLD source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.

Shelf/base definition, trigger basis/state, exact trigger, exact invalidation, fresh/stale/spent state, 24H/daily, macro, IV, event, headline/news, room, extension, blocker priority, caution list, accepted signal row, and final proof fields remain unconfirmed or TO REVIEW where repo evidence does not prove them.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle candidate assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
Ideal or Clean Fast Break is not an accepted relabel for this Continuation candidate fixture unless later repo-backed validation proves it.

This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, production readiness, generated replay reports, chart outcomes, or auto-trading behavior.
